name: Roast Chicken Goes Gourmet
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken to taste with salt and pepper.
2. Roast the chicken at 375°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes until cooked through.
3. Allow the chicken to cool, then remove the skin and shred the meat (you should have about 1 1/4 pounds of meat).
4. Place the shredded chicken in a large bowl.
5. Add the Yogurt-Curry Dressing and toss with the chicken until evenly coated.
6. For each serving, arrange 3 Belgian endive leaves and 3 spinach leaves around the edge of a large plate like flower petals.
7. Place 1 teaspoon of diced tomato on each endive leaf.
8. Place a handful of baby greens in the center of the plate.
9. Arrange the shredded chicken on top of the greens.
10. Stand 3 papayas upright on three sides of the chicken.
11. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon of shredded coconut over the papayas, then add 1/2 tablespoon each of julienned carrot, zucchini, and daikon sprouts.
12. Makes 4 main-dish servings.
